docs.title: Comment on FEAT-44: Feature flags shipped
docs.content:
Comment by nora on FEAT-44:

Shipped. The feature flag service is live in production as of today. All three rollout gates (canary 5%, rollout 20%, GA 100%) are working. Marking this ticket as Done and closing it out. The gradual rollout infra from FEAT-44 is now the standard pattern for all new features going forward.

docs.title: FEAT-44: Build feature flag service with gradual rollout
docs.content:
Issue FEAT-44: Build feature flag service with gradual rollout
Status: Done
Assignee: nora
Description: Implement a feature flag service supporting canary (5%), staged rollout (20%), and GA (100%) tiers. Flags stored in Postgres, evaluated per customer_id.

expected_edges.note: Linear comment explicitly marks FEAT-44 as shipped and done, closing the feature flag ticket
